meta.title: Alvaro Panizo
meta.description: Alvaro Panizo. Senior Product Engineer. Product Manager. Information retrieval and architecture expert. Backend and Data architecture and senior development.

latest_article.label: Latest Article
latest_article.title: Explainability and reasoning in AI integrations

header.headline_html: Product Engineer with a data-driven soul.

paragraphs_html: Think of me as the bridge between deep tech expertise and product strategy.
Having evolved from hands-on Software Engineering to leading high-performing teams,I bring a unique blend oftechnical depthand product thinking to every challenge.
Because great products need more than justgood vibes.

experiences.title: Leading high-performing teams
experiences.subtitle: Product Owner / Team Leader
body_paragraphs_html: I don’t just manage backlogs; I build the environments where engineers do their best work.
Leading cross-functional teams across Europe, the US, and Asia, I bridge cultural and technical gaps to turn ambiguity into shippable code.
By prioritizing radical honesty and empathy, I ensure that "seeing beyond the immediate problem" becomes a team-wide habit, not just a solo effort.

cards.caption_html: Leading teams at the intersection of Product and Engineering for 5+ years, with a core focus on architecting Information Retrieval systems and AI-driven discovery foundations.

cards.quote_html: "He is a truly honest and authentic individual. An excellent teammate and highly empathetic, Álvaro has a unique ability to elevate everyone around him. Any organization that brings him on board will be gaining far more than they ever expected."
cards.attribution_html: Principal Software Engineer - Former Project Colleague (2021-2024)

cards.caption_html: Group Product Manager (2019-2024) - Meet Empathy.co's Product Managers

experiences.title: Technical depth
experiences.subtitle: Senior Software Engineer / Data and Search
body_paragraphs_html: I don’t just write code; I design systems that endure.
My experience spans the entire technical spectrum—from deep-tech R&D to global B2B platforms—delivering everything cloud-native gateways to full-stack SaaS solutions.
By mastering stacks like Java and streaming data, I turn information architectures into stable, scalable products that keep operational excellence at their core.

cards.caption_html: Hands-on engineering background across search, data platforms, APIs, and cloud-native delivery—keeping systems observable and evolvable.

cards.quote_html: "Alvaro is a really talented engineer with a great sense of ownership and commitment. He got up to speed surprisingly fast on really complex topics like search behaviour, big data analytics and data processing."

cards.iframe_title: Technical depth — replace with your video
cards.caption_html: Replace this caption with a talk or demo that reflects your engineering work.

experiences.title: Product thinking
experiences.subtitle: Senior Product Manager | Group Product Manager
body_paragraphs_html: As a Product Manager and Group Product Manager I have connected what the business needs with what gets built—in corporate ERP, SaaS, consultancy, and ad-hoc product work for both enterprise and B2C. I lead discovery and roadmap and keep architecture and product strategy in sync so that user experience and impact stay in focus and execution doesn’t default to “tech for tech’s sake”.

cards.caption_html: Product leadership spanning discovery, roadmap, and alignment between strategy, UX, and engineering delivery.

cards.quote_html: "Alvaro is one of the very few engineers I've worked with that truly has a product mindset. One that can abstract himself from tech entanglement and focus on the problem / human-centered space."

cards.iframe_title: Product thinking — replace with your video

cta_lines_html: Honestly, the fun stuff is right here, but...
if a corporate-approved version of me is needed
footer.about_body_html: Product Engineer with a data-driven soul. I bridge the gap between deep technical expertise and product vision. Having evolved from hands-on Software Engineering to leading high-performing teams, I bring a unique blend of technical depth and product thinking to every challenge. Think of me as the bridge between deep tech expertise and product vision – because the best features are built on solid foundations.
